name: dance1_loop
note: Overman King Gainer OP dance, 16-frame seamless loop (even frames = key poses, odd frames = in-betweens). Rules for EVERY frame: elbows always bent at roughly 90 degrees, upper arms hang close to the torso, both hands are loose fists held IN FRONT of the body, fists NEVER rise above head height and arms are NEVER stretched overhead. The two fists pump up and down in opposite phase (one up near cheek height while the other is down near waist height), like shaking two maracas. LEGS: feet stay CLOSE TOGETHER directly under the hips in every frame — never spread wide, never a squat or horse-riding stance; the bounce shows only as a small knee softening and body-height dip. Frame wording uses IMAGE-side directions (viewer's left/right) unless dual-labeled. Cycle: 0 dip → 1-4 image-left fist rises to cheek while body bounces up → 5-7 fists cross while body sinks → 8 dip → 9-12 image-right fist rises (mirror) → 13-15 cross and sink → loop.
frames: Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance, body at the LOWEST point of a gentle bounce: standing with her feet CLOSE TOGETHER directly under her hips (almost touching), knees only slightly softened so the body sits just a little lower than normal — NOT a squat, NOT a wide stance, legs never spread apart. Torso upright facing forward. Both elbows bent at 90 degrees, upper arms close to her sides, both loose fists held in front of her chest at the SAME height, level with her collarbone. Fists never above head height. Big joyful open-mouth grin, eyes squeezed into happy upturned arcs, cheeks flushed. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance, body just beginning to rise from the lowest point of the bounce, feet CLOSE TOGETHER directly under her hips, knees easing but still slightly soft — NOT a squat, NOT a wide stance. Both elbows bent at 90 degrees, tucked near her sides; the fist on the LEFT side of the image has just started moving UP and is a little above collarbone height, the fist on the RIGHT side of the image has just started moving DOWN and is a little below collarbone height, both fists in front of her body. Arms never straighten, fists never above her shoulders. Head still centered, hair just starting to lift. Wide open-mouth grin, eyes squeezed into happy upturned arcs. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance, body rising slightly out of the dip, feet CLOSE TOGETHER directly under her hips, knees nearly straight — NOT a squat, NOT a wide stance, legs never spread apart. Both elbows stay bent at 90 degrees and tucked near her sides; the fist on the LEFT side of the image is pumping UP and is currently at SHOULDER height (halfway between chest and cheek, never higher than her shoulder), the fist on the RIGHT side of the image is pumping DOWN to waist height, both fists staying in front of her body. Arms never straighten, the elbow stays sharply bent, fists never above her shoulders. Head tips a tiny bit toward the left side of the image, hair starting to swing. Wide open-mouth grin, eyes squeezed into happy upturned arcs. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance, body almost at the top of the bounce, heels about to lift off the ground, feet CLOSE TOGETHER directly under her hips — NOT a wide stance. Both elbows bent at 90 degrees. IMPORTANT: the two fists are FAR APART vertically, at very different heights — the fist on the LEFT side of the image is HIGH, just below her cheek, still moving UP; the fist on the RIGHT side of the image is LOW, down beside her hip. The fists are NOT together, NOT at the same height. Both fists in front of her body, arms never straighten, fists never above her head. Head tilting a little toward the left side of the image, blonde hair swinging toward the left side of the image. Wide open-mouth grin, squeezed happy eyes. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance at the TOP of a small bounce, body at its tallest, knees almost straight, heels slightly off the ground. Both elbows still bent; the fist on the LEFT side of the image is at its HIGHEST point beside her cheek (never above her head), the fist on the RIGHT side of the image is at its LOWEST point beside her hip. Forearms vertical, upper arms close to the torso. Head tilted a little toward the left side of the image, blonde hair swinging toward the left side of the image, skirt lifting slightly. Huge joyful open-mouth grin, squeezed happy eyes, flushed cheeks. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance, body beginning to come down from the top of the bounce, heels settling back onto the ground, feet CLOSE TOGETHER directly under her hips — NOT a wide stance. Both elbows bent at 90 degrees; the fist on the LEFT side of the image is dropping from cheek height down to shoulder height, the fist on the RIGHT side of the image is rising from hip height up to waist height, both fists in front of her body. Arms never straighten, fists never above her shoulders. Head starting to come back toward center, hair following. Wide open-mouth grin, squeezed happy eyes. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance, body settling back down from the bounce, feet CLOSE TOGETHER directly under her hips, knees only slightly softened — NOT a squat, NOT a wide stance. Both elbows bent at 90 degrees; the two fists are passing each other in front of her chest, both momentarily at collarbone height, the fist on the LEFT side of the image moving down and the fist on the RIGHT side of the image moving up. Fists in front of the body, never above head height. Head coming back to center, hair settling. Wide open-mouth grin, happy arc eyes. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance, body sinking toward the lowest point of the bounce, feet CLOSE TOGETHER directly under her hips, knees softening a little more — NOT a squat, NOT a wide stance. Both elbows bent at 90 degrees; both fists have just passed each other and are settling toward the same chest height in front of her body. Arms never straighten, fists never above her shoulders. Head centered, hair drifting downward. Wide open-mouth grin, happy arc eyes, flushed cheeks. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance, body at the LOWEST point of the gentle bounce again: standing with her feet CLOSE TOGETHER directly under her hips (almost touching), knees only slightly softened so the body sits just a little lower than normal — NOT a squat, NOT a wide stance, legs never spread apart. Torso upright facing forward. Both elbows bent at 90 degrees, upper arms close to her sides, both loose fists in front of her chest at the SAME collarbone height. Fists never above head height. Big joyful open-mouth grin, happy arc eyes, flushed cheeks, hair compressed slightly downward from the drop. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance, body just beginning to rise from the lowest point of the bounce, feet CLOSE TOGETHER directly under her hips, knees easing but still slightly soft — NOT a squat, NOT a wide stance. Both elbows bent at 90 degrees, tucked near her sides. This is the MIRROR of the earlier up-beat: HER LEFT fist (the fist near the RIGHT edge of the image) has just started moving UP and is a little above collarbone height, HER RIGHT fist (the fist near the LEFT edge of the image) has just started moving DOWN and is a little below collarbone height, both fists in front of her body. Arms never straighten, fists never above her shoulders. Head still centered, hair just starting to lift. Wide open-mouth grin, eyes squeezed into happy upturned arcs. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance, body rising slightly out of the crouch, knees a little less bent. Both elbows stay bent at 90 degrees and tucked near her sides. This is the MIRROR of the earlier up-beat: this time HER LEFT fist (the fist near the RIGHT edge of the image) is pumping UP to cheek height, and HER RIGHT fist (the fist near the LEFT edge of the image) is pumping DOWN to waist height, both fists staying in front of her body. Arms never straighten, fists never above her head. Head tips a tiny bit toward the right side of the image, hair starting to swing. Wide open-mouth grin, happy arc eyes. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance, body almost at the top of the bounce, heels about to lift off the ground, feet CLOSE TOGETHER directly under her hips — NOT a wide stance. Both elbows bent at 90 degrees. This is the MIRROR of the earlier rise: HER LEFT fist (the fist near the RIGHT edge of the image) is between shoulder and cheek height, still moving UP, HER RIGHT fist (the fist near the LEFT edge of the image) is just below waist height, moving DOWN toward her hip, both fists in front of her body. Arms never straighten, fists never above her head. Head tilting a little toward the right side of the image, blonde hair swinging toward the right side of the image. Wide open-mouth grin, squeezed happy eyes. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance at the TOP of a small bounce, body at its tallest, knees almost straight, heels slightly off the ground. Both elbows still bent. This is the MIRROR of the earlier top-of-bounce: this time HER LEFT fist (the fist near the RIGHT edge of the image) is at its HIGHEST point beside her cheek (never above her head), and HER RIGHT fist (the fist near the LEFT edge of the image) is at its LOWEST point beside her hip. Forearms vertical, upper arms close to the torso. Head tilted a little toward the right side of the image, blonde hair swinging toward the right side of the image, skirt lifting slightly. Huge joyful open-mouth grin, squeezed happy eyes, flushed cheeks. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance, body beginning to come down from the top of the bounce, heels settling back onto the ground, feet CLOSE TOGETHER directly under her hips — NOT a wide stance. Both elbows bent at 90 degrees. IMPORTANT: one fist is low and one fist is high, at clearly DIFFERENT heights. HER RIGHT arm (the arm on the LEFT side of the image) hangs LOW: that fist is DOWN beside her waist, far below her chest. HER LEFT fist (the fist near the RIGHT edge of the image) is at SHOULDER height, dropping down. The fists are NOT together, NOT at the same height — one high, one low. Both fists in front of her body, arms never straighten, fists never above her shoulders. Head starting to come back toward center, hair following. Wide open-mouth grin, squeezed happy eyes. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance, body settling back down from the bounce, feet CLOSE TOGETHER directly under her hips, knees only slightly softened — NOT a squat, NOT a wide stance. Both elbows bent at 90 degrees; the two fists are passing each other in front of her chest, both momentarily at collarbone height, the fist on the RIGHT side of the image moving down and the fist on the LEFT side of the image moving up. Fists in front of the body, never above head height. Head coming back to center, hair settling. Wide open-mouth grin, happy arc eyes. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a goofy rhythmic dance, body sinking toward the lowest point of the bounce, feet CLOSE TOGETHER directly under her hips, knees softening a little more — NOT a squat, NOT a wide stance. Both elbows bent at 90 degrees; both fists have just passed each other and are settling toward the same chest height in front of her body, ready to start the next bounce. Arms never straighten, fists never above her shoulders. Head centered, hair drifting downward. Wide open-mouth grin, happy arc eyes, flushed cheeks. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.
